perks.summary: stratify a patient cohort by biomarker (PD-L1 TPS / HER2 IHC / generic threshold) and emit classified CSV + group distribution + statistical comparisons (read-only)
build publication-ready cohort tables (baseline demographics, efficacy ORR/DCR with binomial CI, CTCAE safety) as CSV + LaTeX (read-only)
fit Kaplan-Meier curves with log-rank test, Cox hazard ratio, number-at-risk table and LaTeX outcome table (read-only)
render a clinical decision algorithm (JSON or simple-text spec) into a TikZ/LaTeX flowchart (read-only)
lint a CDS document (.tex/.md/.txt) for required sections, citations, GRADE grading, statistical reporting and HIPAA identifiers (read-only)
generate an AI scientific schematic via OpenRouter/Nano-Banana (network + OPENROUTER_API_KEY)
